runs.summary: Renamed package to 'takt' and moved trello/ to src/. All tests pass.
Created CLI entry point with help, version, and error handling. Global takt command works.
Implemented authentication commands (register/login/whoami/logout) and session management.
Implemented serve command with port flag support. Updated outputs to say 'Takt'.
Implemented all board commands with proper access control and formatting options.
Implemented all column commands (list, create, update, delete, reorder) with tests.
